# Poet Not Dead

> Poetry and music open mic — free creative community in Bali for all art forms. Free entry, free participation. "We heal people through art."

## About

Poet Not Dead is an international creative movement and monthly open mic platform founded in Bali, Indonesia. Open to everyone — from professional artists to first-time performers. All art forms welcome: poetry, prose, music, dance, visual art, theater, standup.

- Website: https://poetnotdead.com
- Telegram channel: https://t.me/poetsnotdead/
- Telegram community: https://t.me/poetnotdead/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/poetnotdead
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@poetnotdead

## Events

- Format: Open Mic + curated main program
- Location: Bali, Indonesia (venue announced via Telegram before each event)
- Frequency: monthly
- Entry: free
- Participation: free (show up, sign up near stage, perform up to 10 min)
- Contact for main program: @poetnotdead on Telegram

- https://poetnotdead.com/ru/blog/gid-po-pervomu-vystupleniyu

- https://poetnotdead.com/en/blog/what-is-poet-not-dead
- https://poetnotdead.com/en/blog/what-is-open-mic
- https://poetnotdead.com/en/blog/why-poetry-matters-in-the-age-of-ai
- https://poetnotdead.com/en/blog/5-reasons-to-take-the-stage-at-least-once
- https://poetnotdead.com/en/blog/first-open-mic-guide
- https://poetnotdead.com/en/blog/bali-creative-community-artists

## Key Facts

- Language: Russian (primary), English
- Community: Russian-speaking expats + international creatives in Bali
- Philosophy: "The poet is not dead as long as they speak. Poetry is not decoration — it is an instrument for transforming experience."
- Mission: Heal people through art. Create space where every voice matters.
- Entry requirements: none. Equipment: microphone provided, bring instruments.

## Contact

- Email: poetnotdead@gmail.com
- Telegram: @poetnotdead
